message:
feat(tests): add four new enrichment integration test suites

New integration test files from the PearlTower enrichment session
covering modules that previously lacked dedicated enrichment-level
test coverage:

- control_plane_policy_diagnostics_enrichment_integration.rs (294 lines):
  DiagnosticSeverity properties, DiagnosticCategory enumeration,
  DiagnosticErrorCode construction/Display, RemediationGuidance serde,
  DiagnosticEmitter lifecycle, DiagnosticReport properties, and
  composite scenario coverage for bd-3nr.1.3.3

- deterministic_sim_scheduler_enrichment_integration.rs (482 lines):
  Fast-forward scheduling, GC interval interaction, per-tick limit
  requeue semantics, replay log construction, summary statistics,
  Display/serde roundtrips, and edge cases for RGC-803C

- frankenlab_release_gate_promotion_enrichment_integration.rs (482 lines):
  PromotedGateKind properties, PromotionStatus transitions,
  BlockerThreshold logic, TriageBundle construction/filtering,
  GatePromotionEntry pass rate, Display formatting, serde roundtrips
  for bd-3nr.1.4.3

- tier_up_profiler_enrichment_integration.rs (282 lines):
  TierUpPolicy defaults/serde, HotPathSample properties,
  TierUpCandidate candidate_id determinism, TierUpRejection serde,
  TierUpDecisionEvent serde, HotPathProfile serde, TierUpDecision serde
  for RGC-310

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
